meaning: n.<俄> 杜马(俄皇时代的国会,俄罗斯议会)
examples: Ms Duma told BBC News that a web-based resource was "absolutely the way to go".
The agreement still requires ratification from the full Senate and the Russian Duma.
Oleg Morozov is the first deputy speaker of the Russian Duma, the lower house of parliament.
The State Duma should be given investigatory and judicial powers in cases of state importance.
Elections to Russia's lower house of parliament - the Duma - are scheduled for December 2011.
